description: Novel Prep Math 7 placement — 20 constructed-response items from Part III of Placement_Middle_Level.tex.

brand.trust_line: Responses are saved for teacher review. Score bands follow the printed middle-level placement guide (16/20 to advance).
brand.trust_line_zh: 作答已保存供教师批阅。分数区间与纸质初中段分班测试说明一致（当前档位建议 16/20 及以上晋级）。

score_band_rubric.title: Below Math 7 readiness
score_band_rubric.headline: Strengthen Math 6 skills before Math 7.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 建议先巩固 Math 6 能力，再进入 Math 7。
score_band_rubric.summary: Printed guide: fewer than 12 correct in Part III suggests staying at or below Math 6.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 与官方说明一致：Part III 正确题数不足 12 题时建议留在 Math 6 或以下补强。
highlights: Review ratios, proportions, and pre-algebra fluency.
Use earlier bands for remediation if foundational gaps appear.
Teacher should grade written work using the printable answer key.

score_band_rubric.title: Borderline Math 7
score_band_rubric.headline: Near Math 7 readiness — targeted support recommended.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 接近 Math 7 门槛，建议针对性支持。
score_band_rubric.summary: Borderline band on Part III; confirm with teacher review before advancing.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: Part III 边缘区间；建议教师结合书写过程确认后再晋级。
highlights: Target missed items from this 20-question band.
Use the printable test for full five-band progression.

score_band_rubric.title: Math 7 ready
score_band_rubric.headline: Strong Math 7/6 readiness on this band.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 在本档位表现达到 Math 7 准备度。
score_band_rubric.summary: Printed guide: 16+ correct in Part III supports Math 7 placement and integrated-track consideration.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 与官方说明一致：Part III 达 16 题及以上支持 Math 7 分班，并可评估 Integrated 路径。
highlights: Maintain fluency with integers, expressions, and geometry basics.
Consider Enhanced Math 1 placement when school recommends integrated track.
Teacher grading of constructed responses confirms final placement.
